title: Out and About Movie 2: Las Vegas Adventure
original_title: Out and About 2: Las Vegas Adventure
overview: YouTubers Brendan Mitchell and his pint-sized sidekick Gabriel Mercado make their long-awaited return to Sin City. They double-down with new crew members and a mysterious fanny pack.
